projectName: SS Art Basel 2025 Timeline + Install Process

tabs.name: Timeline + Install Process
tabs.description: PDF-derived Miami Art Basel 2025 timeline and install/strike process.

data.title: Notice to proceed + initial payment.
data.notes: Timeline source: SS Art Basel 2025 Delivery Plan, page 2. Scheduled Nov 12.

data.title: Purchase, fabricate, repair.
data.notes: Scheduled Nov 17-Dec 2. Covers item purchase, fabrication, repair, and replacement prep before site commissioning.

data.title: Receive containers, VR, etc.
data.notes: Overview row shows Nov 27. Detailed rows split this into 12k VR and shipping-container deliveries.

data.title: Power available on site.
data.notes: Rental need: Nov 27-Dec 10. PDF calls for one 50A @ 240V supply and a spider box with two 30A @ 240V outlets.

data.title: Ground anchors ready.
data.notes: Rental need: Nov 28-Dec 10. Includes PE46-Hex penetrators and PE46-TC tie-off cables.

data.title: Crane window for install.
data.notes: Install crane window: Dec 1, 8am-12pm. PDF calls for 10k capacity at 32ft minimum reach and 50ft pickpoint height.

data.title: Arrive on site and set up HQ.
Sort light pods, cloths, cables into types.
Assemble top half of sphere layer-by-layer.
data.notes: Scheduled Nov 28-29. Includes structure, lights, and audio layer-by-layer.

data.title: Assemble floor rings and nest in sphere.
Join top to bottom with crane.
data.notes: Install process scheduled Dec 1. PDF note: need big crane for this step.

data.title: Wire up lights + audio and test.
Install interior walkways, DJ platform, entry platform.
Set up signage and bring in cushions.
Test content + live playback capability.
data.notes: Scheduled Dec 3-4. This is the content/playback readiness check before the public event window.

data.title: Remove equator lights, speakers, and crossing cables.
data.notes: Strike process scheduled Dec 8. Combines removal of lights/speakers around the equator and cables that cross the equator.

data.title: Remove interior walkways and drop net.
Disconnect floor truss legs and rig top pick-point.
Strip top and bottom of sphere; strike stairs.
Load containers and ship to storage.
data.notes: Overview includes Ship to storage on Dec 10. Detailed process includes loading containers on Dec 10.
